author: Anant Goel
name: 11L Production: Value Residual + Gated Attention
blurb: Full community stack + Value Residual (-0.015 BPB) + Gated Attention (-0.003 BPB) on 11L MLP3x with EMA, XSA4, Partial RoPE. Unlimited compute, 1xA6000, 9500 steps.
novel_contributions: Value Residual (ResFormer, arXiv:2410.17897) — caches layer-0 V vectors and mixes into subsequent layers via learnable scalars, -0.015 BPB
Gated Attention (arXiv:2505.06708) — per-head sigmoid gate after SDPA, eliminates attention sinks, -0.003 BPB
